content:
Cloud infrastructure for MCP servers and Claude / ChatGPT apps.

Senior Infrastructure Engineer
$100K - $180K•0.10% - 0.70%•San Francisco, CA, US / Remote
Job type
Full-time

Role
Engineering, Devops

Experience
3+ years

Visa
Will sponsor

Skills
Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud, TypeScript

Connect directly with founders of the best YC-funded startups.
Apply to role ›

About the role
About us

Manufact is Vercel for MCP.

We are building the MCP cloud platform to get any product ready for Claude Connectors marketplace, ChatGPT App Store and any AI agent that supports MCP.

Manufact Cloud usage is more than doubling every month.

We're the team behind mcp-use SDK (next.js for MCP), the open-source framework for building MCP Apps with 10k Github stars and 8M+ downloads across python and typescript.

Used by 20% of US 500 like NASA, SAP, NVIDIA and more than 5,000 companies.

We raised $6.3M seed in 4 days before YC demo day. Our lead investor is PeakXV (best dev-tools VC out there), and we have the best angels, including the founders of Supabase.

Our focus: capture a significant share of global AI tool calls that flow through Manufact.

What you'll do

• Build the cloud platform that hosts customer MCP servers with millions of tool calls.

• Set up monitoring, observability, and dashboards across every MCP server on Manufact Cloud and the full stream of events and logs we ingest, so problems surface before users feel them.

• Build alerting and error handling that flags threshold breaches and failures in real time.

• Make sure the platform scales as we add thousands of users and capture a growing share of global AI tool calls.

• Create the tooling and technical blueprints that let customers deploy Manufact into their own private clouds (AWS, Azure, GCP) on their own terms.

• Build the security boundaries that keep each customer's data private and isolated within their own environment.

• Own where our code lives and how it ships: code hosting and the release pipeline.

• Keep the system fast and reliable as companies add more MCP servers.

Requirements

• You have built and operated cloud systems end-to-end and know them inside out.

• Experience standing up the observability stack that keeps a cloud healthy: logs, metrics, traces, dashboards, and alerting at scale.

• Kubernetes or Terraform, and containerized multi-tenant systems.

• Comfortable being the first person to own infrastructure at a fast-growing startup.

• Based in or willing to relocate to San Francisco.

Nice to have

• Hands-on with observability tooling such as ClickHouse, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, Grafana.

• Experience running a platform that others deploy onto (PaaS-flavored).

About the interview
Interview process

• Tell us about infrastructure you've built and operated, and share URLs, writeups, or repos.

• Intro call with a founder.

• Design exercise: architect the hosting plus observability layer for a platform like Manufact Cloud, then walk through it with the team.

• Paid trial with the team.

About Manufact
Manufact provides open-source dev tools and infrastructure for MCP to help dev teams quickly build and deploy MCP Servers for AI agents & MCP Apps for ChatGPT and Claude.
We developed the mcp-use SDK, which has over 7M downloads and 10,000 GitHub stars, and is used by 20% of the US 500.
Create MCP servers/apps in minutes, connect your GitHub repo, and make them immediately available to AI agents and ChatGPT.

Founded:2025
Batch:S25
Team Size:5
Status:Active
Location:San Francisco
